articles.title: Wildfire in southern France forces evacuation of 10,000 people
articles.difficulty_reason: Short, direct disaster report with a clear story and simple sentence structure; mostly B1/B2 vocabulary and little background knowledge needed.

articles.title: Zelensky to press Nato for air defence systems after intense Russian strikes
articles.difficulty_reason: Moderate-length news analysis with longer sentences and diplomatic/military vocabulary; some background on the war is helpful but the story stays clear.

articles.title: Artificial intelligence: Yann LeCun works on more flexible AI
articles.difficulty_reason: Dense, analytical technology feature with abstract concepts, quotations and complex sentences; B2/C1/C2 vocabulary and some prior knowledge of AI make it the most demanding.
